revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月十九]][[zh:十二月十九]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 19|qq=December 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|qid=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku|1=Meitoku}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1392|en|1392|qid=Q6382|lt=1392|1=1392}} {{ill|January 13|en|January 13|qid=Q2255|lt=January 13|1=January 13}} ) – The {{ill|Meitoku Rebellion|ja|明徳の乱|lt=Meitoku Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Rebellion|1=Meitoku Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10315231}} : the clan of the {{ill|regional military governors|ja|守護大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/regional military governors|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5368717}} , led by {{ill|Yamana Kiyosei|ja|山名氏清|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Kiyosei|1=Ujikiyo Yamana|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11467600}} and {{ill|Yamana Mitsuyuki|ja|山名満幸|lt=Yamana Mitsuyuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mitsuyuki|1=Yamana Mitsuyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11467602}} , rebelled against the {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|lt=Muromachi Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 14th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|qid=Q6744|lt=1587|1=1587}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}} ) – The {{ill|Kampaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kampaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}} {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Hatsushiba Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} was appointed as the {{ill|Grand Minister of State|ja|Daijō-daijin|1=Daijō-daijin|2=ja|3=太政大臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Grand Minister of State|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1157586}} . * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}} {{ill|February 5|en|February 5|qid=Q2319|lt=February 5|1=February 5}} ) – The martyrdom of the {{ill|26 Martyrs of Japan|en|26 Martyrs of Japan|qid=Q578963|lt=26 Martyrs of Japan|1=26 Martyrs of Japan}} : Toyotomi Hideyoshi had 6 foreign {{ill|Missionary|en|Missionary|qid=Q219477|lt=missionary|1=Missionary}} s and 20 Japanese monks and believers executed by crucifixion in {{ill|Nagasaki (disambiguation)|en|Nagasaki (disambiguation)|qid=Q294167|lt=Nagasaki|1=Nagasaki (disambiguation)}} . * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 19th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}} ) – A peace agreement was reached between the Tokugawa and Toyotomi forces during the {{ill|Osaka Winter Campaign|ja|大坂冬の陣|lt=Osaka Winter Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Winter Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q475780}} . * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Edo Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} declared the {{ill|Ogasawara Islands|ja|小笠原諸島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ogasawara Islands|comment=changed title based on wikidata|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=Ogasawara Islands|qid=Q13383295}} as Japanese territory. == Births == * {{ill|Keiyū|ja|景祐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiyū|1=Jingyou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11090134}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1037|en|1037|qid=Q19335|lt=1037|1=1037}} {{ill|January 8|en|January 8|qid=Q2234|lt=January 8|1=January 8}} ) – {{ill|Su Shi|en|Su Shi|qid=Q36020|lt=Su Dongpo|1=Su Shi}} , a literati and calligrapher of the {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=Northern Song (960–1127)|qid=Q319460}} (died {{ill|1101|en|1101|qid=Q12053|lt=1101|1=1101}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} {{ill|February 5|en|February 5|qid=Q2319|lt=February 5|1=February 5}} ) – {{ill|Tenshō-in|en|Tenshō-in|qid=Q1063767|lt=Tenshōin|1=Tenshō-in}} , the Imperial Consort (御台所) of {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|en|Tokugawa Iesada|qid=Q336383|lt=Tokugawa Iesada|1=Tokugawa Iesada}} (died {{ill|1883|en|1883|qid=Q7816|lt=1883|1=1883}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 7th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}} ) – {{ill|Tomioka Tessai|en|Tomioka Tessai|qid=Q1377454|lt=Tomioka Tessai|1=Tomioka Tessai}} , a Japanese painter (died {{ill|1924|en|1924|qid=Q2173|lt=1924|1=1924}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1752|en|1752|qid=Q7618|lt=1752|1=1752}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}} ) – {{ill|Ōoka Tadasuke|en|Ōoka Tadasuke|qid=Q1054143|lt=Ōoka Tadasuke|1=Ōoka Tadasuke}} (also known as Ōoka Echizen), a town magistrate ({{ill|Machi-bugyō|en|Machi-bugyō|qid=Q908892|lt=Town Magistrate|1=Machi-bugyō}} ) and temple and shrine magistrate ({{ill|Jisha-bugyō|en|Jisha-bugyō|qid=Q1036279|lt=Temple and Shrine Magistrate|1=Jisha-bugyō}} ) (born {{ill|1677|en|1677|qid=Q7631|lt=1677|1=1677}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|18|12|20|11|19|1|12|1219|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 19일]] [[ja:12月19日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月十九]]
[[ar:December 19 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月十九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月十九]] {{wikidata link|Q841038}} [[Category:Days 19 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar December]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
